dev:
@php -r "$p=getenv('ADMIN_PATH')?:'ctrl-k9m2x7p4'; echo "
  Portfolio site  →  http://localhost:8000
  Admin panel     →  http://localhost:8000/$p
  Press Ctrl+C to stop.

";"

scripts-descriptions.dev: Start the local PHP dev server on http://localhost:8000
scripts-descriptions.setup: First-time setup: copy .env.example, then build & seed the DB
scripts-descriptions.db:fresh: DROP database, then schema + seed (DANGEROUS — destroys data)
